lines: Horace sorts corroded machine pieces by the kind of failure that took them.
"If Noa sent you, tell me how much flow she wants and how long she expects a hand valve to stay hand-held. I keep no bin for miracles."

choices.label: Ask what the annex records say
Leave Horace with the salvage bins

lines: "The rear cage held bypass schedules and valve charts from the first relief works. The roof collapsed across the direct aisle."
"The west service door reaches the files. I can lift the main latch for you. Bring a lamp and respect the beams."

choices.label: Ask why he stayed with the ruins
Leave Horace with the salvage bins

lines: "Because every city calls old relief stock obsolete until a pump stops."
"Also because I know which floor plates lie. That knowledge is heavier to move than copper."

choices.label: Leave Horace with the salvage bins
